positive: A mystical woodland scene featuring a majestic deer drinking from a glowing crystal pond. The deer is positioned centrally, with an elegant, graceful silhouette. Surrounding elements include bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate fern fronds, and subtle swirls of magical mist. Use an Art Nouveau style with strong lines, deep jewel tones (emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple) contrasted with glowing gold accents. The composition should be highly symmetrical, suitable for repeating pattern or a central chest graphic. Clean lines, highly detailed forest textures, dreamlike, elegant, whimsical, vector art influence, volumetric lighting.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, copyright, low quality, bad anatomy, artifacts, grain, noise, disfigured, poorly drawn, extra limbs, multiple heads
